attempts.provenance: The original truncate-only implementation did not retain complete detail, so the failure cannot be diagnosed retrospectively.
attempts.resumeTrigger: Replace the retention boundary before another attempt.
attempts.nonClaim: No cause is inferred and no release result is established.

attempts.provenance: The retained verification detail identified unused exports in the first HGI-203 candidate.
attempts.resumeTrigger: Repair the unused exports before a new attempt.
attempts.nonClaim: The failed local check establishes no publication or deployment state.

attempts.provenance: The retained verification detail showed Effect-boundary, direct-host-API and lint violations in a superseded fallback implementation.
attempts.resumeTrigger: Replace the fallback with an Effect Platform implementation before a new attempt.
attempts.nonClaim: This historical failure does not describe the repaired candidate and proves no external state.

attempts.provenance: The repaired runner preserved a true verification exit of 1 and identified one repository-policy fixture containing a literal personal home-path shape.
attempts.resumeTrigger: Remove the literal personal path from the adversarial fixture while preserving its constructed-path coverage.
attempts.nonClaim: No later release check ran and no external operation occurred.

attempts.provenance: Repository verification reached Knip and rejected four unnecessary exports from the new internal evidence Schemas.
attempts.resumeTrigger: Remove the unused public export modifiers and rerun only after Knip and package type checks pass.
attempts.nonClaim: No later release check ran and no external operation occurred.

attempts.provenance: Repository verification reached the production Knip graph, which classified five production-used focused-test seams as unused exports because tests are excluded from that graph.
attempts.resumeTrigger: Add exact production-Knip exceptions for only the evidence boundary and live redactor test seams, document them, and prove both Knip graphs pass.
attempts.nonClaim: No later release check ran and no external operation occurred.

rollback: Retain this provenance index when reverting HGI-203; do not restore failed implementations.
nonClaim: This index preserves bounded provenance, not complete historical raw output. Exact ignored paths and digests identify locally retained detail when present.
